run_summary.summary: Flexsteel Popfly thread picked up from Apr 17 — this was missed from main. Ian Saunders confirmed the filming delay to May 13/14 is totally fine and said the end-of-May posting deadline still holds. He did ask about the Popfly 'apply' button. Kenny replied at 1:10 PM that he hadn't done it yet but would do it 'later today' (Apr 17). It's now Apr 18 — no confirmation in the thread that it got done. This is a real blocker: drafts can't be uploaded to Popfly until Kenny hits apply. Needs a check-in today.

suggestions.message: Kenny told Ian he'd hit 'apply' on the Popfly campaign link by end of day Apr 17. It's Apr 18 and there's no follow-up in the thread — can you confirm that got done? Drafts can't be uploaded until it is. 📋
Ian confirmed filming delay to May 13/14 is totally understandable — end-of-May posting deadline still intact. Just need that Popfly apply button hit so you're set up when filming happens. 🎬

deals.next_action: Confirm Kenny hit 'apply' on Popfly campaign link (committed Apr 17) — required before drafts can be uploaded
deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com) confirmed filming delay to May 13/14 at Steinhafels (Downers Grove, IL) is 'totally understandable' — end-of-May posting deadline still holds per agreement. Ian asked if Kenny had hit 'apply' on the Popfly campaign link (required to enable draft uploads). Kenny replied at 1:10 PM: 'I hadn't tried that yet, but will get that set up later today.' As of Apr 18, no confirmation in thread.
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: Ian confirmed flexibility on filming timeline (May 13/14 OK). Kenny committed to hitting Popfly 'apply' by end of day Apr 17 — unconfirmed as of Apr 18.

run_summary.summary: Flexsteel thread is active — Kenny updated Ian Saunders (Popfly) on a filming delay for the 3rd video. Dad's pacemaker surgery is end of April with a follow-up May 11 in Naples, so the earliest they can film the reveal at Steinhafels (Downers Grove, IL) is May 13/14. Ian said that's totally understandable — end-of-May deadline still holds per the agreement. One urgent action item Kenny committed to: hitting 'apply' on the Popfly campaign link so drafts can be uploaded. He said he'd do it Apr 17 — check in if that hasn't happened yet.

suggestions.message: Kenny told Ian he'd hit 'apply' on the Popfly campaign link by end of day Apr 17 — needed before any draft can be uploaded. Check that it's done! 📋
3rd video filming pushed to May 13/14 at Steinhafels Downers Grove. End-of-May posting deadline per agreement — still on track, just barely. 🎬

deals.notes: [Apr 17]: Kenny emailed Ian Saunders (Popfly) — filming 3rd video delayed due to dad's pacemaker surgery (end of April) + follow-up doctor appt May 11 in Naples. Earliest filming: May 13/14 at Steinhafels in Downers Grove, IL. Kenny noted agreement allows until end of May to post 3rd video. Ian confirmed flexibility ('totally understandable'). Ian asked Kenny to hit 'apply' on Popfly campaign link so drafts can be uploaded to platform; Kenny said he'll do it today (Apr 17).
deals.activity_note: Apr 17: 3rd video filming delayed to May 13/14 — dad's medical schedule. Ian OK with timeline, end-of-May deadline still intact. Kenny to apply on Popfly platform.
